creator: chris@cretaforce.gr
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #29)

If you can switch the default to GnuTLS and have an option to select OpenSSL I am fine with it as I don't use packages.

Tomorrow I will try to see which exactly OpenSSL version is related to the issue and I will submit a PR to OpenSSL so see if they know something about it.
